frame_analyses.description: Instruments are loaded with the needle, ready to start suture placement.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle is well-secured and aligned for insertion.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is being inserted through the first mark on the drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry angle appears appropriate, minor deviation observed.

frame_analyses.description: First throw is being made using a double throw technique.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Surgeon's knot is formed properly, initial tension applied correctly.

frame_analyses.description: Second single throw is in progress, hands have switched.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switch observed, smooth motion during throw.

frame_analyses.description: Final single throw is being executed, hands have switched again.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switch completed, ensuring knot security.

frame_analyses.description: Suture ends are being cut to complete the task.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cuts made close to knot, ensuring neat finish.

knot_assessments.notes: Proper hand switch, knot is tight.
Final hand switch executed, knot completed securely.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: No gaps visible, slit closed well.

technique_summary: The suture and knot tying were performed effectively, with precise hand switching and secure knots, achieving closure without gaps.
improvement_suggestions: Practice reducing suture deviation from marks.
Continue refining hand-switch techniques for efficiency.
strengths: Effective and timely hand switching between throws.
